title: hesperis theophrasti subsp. graeca
intro: Hesperis theophrasti subsp. graeca, also known as Graecian rocket or mountain rocket, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mustard family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, as well as acting as an expectorant to relieve coughs and congestion. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Hesperis theophrasti subsp. graeca can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
